rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO BUENO ET AL VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Complaint Of Plaintiff, Alicia E. Hasper, Dba Alicia E. Hasper, Lac
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 06, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTs HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, HAWK LOU, HAWK LOU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Complaint Of Plaintiff, Alicia E. Hasper, Dba Alicia E. Hasper, Lac DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to the enforceability of the exculpatory provision of the lease under the circumstances of the Lease. See CC 1668, Capri v. L.A Fitness Intern., LLC (2006) 136 Cal.App.4th 1078 and Hanna v. Lederman (1963) 223 Cal.App.2d 786; Moving party's fact 3; Additional Disputed Material Facts 1, 2, 4, 6, 7 etc. The Court notes that Defendant failed to properly file its reply. The reply submitted for filing has not been properly signed and no more attempts were made to submit a properly signed reply for filing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 06, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, RECONTRUST, N.A., DEUTSCHE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the second cause of action for violation of CC 2923.55. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to the breach of contract and UCL violation causes of action for Plaintiff to allege enforceable breached term(s), breach of the term(s) by Deutsche and NationStar, and damages caused by the particular breach. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 06, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT CHRIS BAKER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET, LLC VS. CHRIS BAKER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 06, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT CHRIS BAKER's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to properly verify finalized complaint. It cannot be determined from the face of the complaint whether allegations in it have or have not been altered after verification. Counsel's signature of a later date might indicate that allegations at the time of verification might not have been finalized. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAYVIEW PRESERVATION, L.P. VS. THE ESTATE OF SHIRLEY R. MASON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Anastasia M. Willoughby In The Amount Of $960.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Julia M. Adams In Support Thereof; And Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 06, 2017, line 8. PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW PRESERVATION, L.P.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Anastasia M. Willoughby In The Amount Of $960.00; GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960. = (501/REQ)
